CustomField.description: DEPRECATED as of v1.5. Salesforce bills Flex Credits per tier-per-invocation, not per model. Pricing is now driven by Tier__c against FluentMetric_Cost_Settings__c.Tier_Basic_FC__c / Tier_Standard_FC__c / Tier_Advanced_FC__c. This field is retained as a nullable override escape hatch but is no longer consulted by the primary cost path.
CustomField.label: Flex Credits Per Call
